cdp_params.functionDeclaration: function() { const el = this; if (!(el instanceof Element)) return { blocked: false }; if (el instanceof HTMLInputElement) { const type = String(el.type || '').toLowerCase(); const autocomplete = String(el.autocomplete || '').toLowerCase(); const blocked = type === 'password' || autocomplete.includes('current-password') || autocomplete.includes('new-password'); return { blocked, reason: blocked ? 'password_input' : undefined }; } return { blocked: false }; }
